flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lamar Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.6k → $7.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lamar Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.1k → $4.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lamar Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lamar Community College fell 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.0k → $8.8k).
